zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernán González de Henestrosa於1264年出生時，他的父親Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa12歲，母親María Zúñiga40歲。他於大約1283年與Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年在西班牙坎塔布里亞瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernán González de Henestrosa于1264年出生时，他的父亲Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa12岁，母亲María Zúñiga40岁。他于大约1283年与Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年在西班牙坎塔布里亞瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fernán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

variants.name: Hernán

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

en.lifeSummary: When Fernán González de Henestrosa was born in 1264, his father, Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa, was 12 and his mother, María Zúñiga, was 40. He married Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias about 1283, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1341, in Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Cantabria, Spain, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernán González de Henestrosa est né en 1264, son père, Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa, avait 12 ans et sa mère, María Zúñiga, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias environ 1283, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1341, à Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Cantabria, Espagne, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Henestrosa(이)가 1264년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 María Zúñiga(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1283년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 스페인 캔타브리아 발데오리 헨스트로자 데 라스 퀸탠이라스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias aproximadamente 1283, em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernán González de Henestrosa родился в 1264 г., его отцу по имени Gonzalo Pérez de Henestrosa было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали María Zúñiga, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias около 1283 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1341 г. в местности хинестроса де лас куинтаниллас, валдеолеа, кантабря, Испания в возрасте 77 лет.

Se casó con Maria de Henestrosa de Asturias aproximadamente 1283, en Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1341, en Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Cantabria, España, a la edad de 77 años.
